2603.24580.title: Retrieval Improvements Do Not Guarantee Better Answers: A Study of RAG for AI Policy QA
2603.24580.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems are increasingly used to analyze complex policy documents, but achieving sufficient reliability for expert usage remains challenging in domains characterized by dense legal language and evolving, overlapping regulatory frameworks. We study the application of RAG to AI governance and policy analysis using the AI Governance and Regulatory Archive (AGORA) corpus, a curated collection of 947 AI policy documents. Our system combines a ColBERT-based retriever fine-tuned with contrastive learning and a generator aligned to human preferences using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). We construct synthetic queries and collect pairwise preferences to adapt the system to the policy domain. Through experiments evaluating retrieval quality, answer relevance, and faithfulness, we find that domain-specific fine-tuning improves retrieval metrics but does not consistently improve end-to-end question answering performance. In some cases, stronger retrieval counterintuitively leads to more confident hallucinations when relevant documents are absent from the corpus. These results highlight a key concern for those building policy-focused RAG systems: improvements to individual components do not necessarily translate to more reliable answers. Our findings provide practical insights for designing grounded question-answering systems over dynamic regulatory corpora.
2603.24580.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）系統越來越多地用於分析複雜的政策文件，但在法律語言密集且不斷演變、重疊的監管框架中，實現足夠的可靠性以供專家使用仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>我們研究了將 RAG 應用於 AI 治理和政策分析，使用 AI 治理和監管檔案（AGORA）語料庫，這是一個經過策劃的 947 份 AI 政策文件的集合。<lb/>我們的系統結合了一個基於 ColBERT 的檢索器，該檢索器經過對比學習的微調，以及一個使用直接偏好優化（DPO）與人類偏好對齊的生成器。<lb/>我們構建了合成查詢並收集成對偏好，以使系統適應政策領域。<lb/>通過評估檢索質量、答案相關性和忠實性的實驗，我們發現特定領域的微調改善了檢索指標，但並不總是能一致提高端到端的問題回答性能。<lb/>在某些情況下，較強的檢索反而在相關文件缺失的情況下導致更自信的幻覺。<lb/>這些結果突顯了對於那些構建以政策為重點的 RAG 系統的人來說的一個關鍵擔憂：對個別組件的改進不一定能轉化為更可靠的答案。<lb/>我們的發現為設計基於動態監管語料庫的基礎問題回答系統提供了實用的見解。
2603.24580.author: Saahil Mathur et.al.
2603.24580.authors: Saahil Mathur, Ryan David Rittner, Vedant Ajit Thakur, Daniel Stuart Schiff, Tunazzina Islam
